problems.title: Invalid username
problems.detail: The provided username is not valid. Use 3 to 100 characters containing only letters, digits, underscores, hyphens, or dots.

problems.title: Insecure password
problems.detail: The provided password does not meet the security requirements. Password must be at least 8 characters long and include uppercase, lowercase, and numeric characters.

problems.title: Email already exists
problems.detail: The provided email address is already associated with an existing account.

problems.title: Username already exists
problems.detail: The provided username is already in use.

problems.title: Invalid email
problems.detail: The provided email is not in a valid format.

problems.title: User not found
problems.detail: No user exists with the provided identifier.

problems.title: Invalid credentials
problems.detail: The provided email or password is incorrect.

problems.title: Invalid token
problems.detail: The provided session cookie is invalid or no longer exists.

problems.title: Expired token
problems.detail: The provided session cookie has expired.

problems.title: No user currently logged in
problems.detail: No session cookie was provided with the request.
